name: Iced Jazzberry Java
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the frozen raspberries, granulated sugar, and water in a blender until smooth.
2. Strain the mixture into a large mixing bowl to remove any solids.
3. Add the cold coffee and half-and-half to the bowl. Stir well to combine.
4. Pour the mixture into 12-ounce glasses that are partially filled with crushed ice.
5. Top each glass with sweetened whipped cream, mint sprigs, and whole raspberries.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 150 calories; 7.27 grams total fat (41 percent of calories from fat); 25.2 milligrams cholesterol; 20.3 milligrams sodium.
